---
title: "Regression I"
subtitle: "Subset selection and shrinkage"
date: "Sep 11, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Linear regression as a baseline; best-subset and stepwise selection; ridge regression and the lasso as principled alternatives when p is large or predictors are correlated.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 3, 6

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- ✏️ [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)  *(in-class version)*
- 🖨️ [Slides (2-up)](slides_split.pdf)  *(two per page, for printing)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Frank and Friedman (1993)](readings/Frank and Friedman (1993).pdf)
- 📄 [Heinze et al. (2017)](readings/Heinze et al. (2017).pdf)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)
- 📈 [fig3.R](code/fig3.R)
- 📈 [fig4.R](code/fig4.R)

**Other scripts:**

- 📜 [helper.R](code/helper.R)
- 📜 [model1.R](code/model1.R)

## 🗂️ Data

- 📊 [insurance.csv](data/insurance.csv)
- 📊 [neonatal_brain_volumes.csv](data/neonatal_brain_volumes.csv)
- 📊 [prostate_cancer.csv](data/prostate_cancer.csv)
- 📊 [student_credit.csv](data/student_credit.csv)
